title: Average
note: Shows how world record averages have progressed over time for each event. For 333mbf and 333mbo, Mo3 (mean of 3) is used as an unofficial substitute.
noteZh: 展示各项目世界纪录平均成绩的历史变化。对于 333mbf 和 333mbo，使用非官方的 Mo3（三次均值）代替。

sections.title: Rubik's Magic
rows: [Phoochit Roonooy (ภูชิสส์ รุ่นอ๋อย)](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/persons/2010ROON01)
